# alex-vicente.dev - AI Engineer Portfolio

Owner: Alex Vicente
Primary Language: Spanish (es) and English (en)
Site: https://alex-vicente.dev

## Summary
Portfolio focused on AI engineering, applied AI, LLM, MLOps, and frontend software engineering with Angular.
